sections.heading: Released Baseline
sections.text: LeakTestProgram V3.4 is approved, effective and current for the synthetic demo route.

sections.heading: Validated Parameters
sections.text: Validated settings are 500 ± 5 kPa, 3.0 second stabilization and 5.0 second measurement.

sections.heading: Quality Approval
sections.text: The governed validation record is complete and supports current release status.
